+## ⚠️ CRITICAL CRISIS: S2/S3 CONVERSION CRASH (Week 11)
+### Root Causes:
+1. **Competitor quality events** (ApexSaaS +0.0940, CloudPeak +0.0774-0.0918, QuantumEdge +0.0948, RivalTech +0.0918) raised S2/S3 quality expectations
+2. **Quota complaints** from S2/S3 users (4 negative Day 77 posts about hitting walls mid-project) damaged reputation
+### Conversion Rates:
+- S1: 12% → 21.1% (IMPROVED! Less affected by competitor events, quality improved)
+- S2: 22.5% → 7.4% (CRASHED! Plan B quality 0.4211 now below raised ~0.46 threshold)
+- S3: 21.6% → 4.9% (CRASHED! Quota reputation damage + possible expectation rise)
+### FIXES APPLIED (Day 77):
+1. **Quotas raised**: A=2000, B=8000, C=20000 units/day (was 750/2000/4000)
+2. **S2/S3 dev spend increased**: S2 $400→$800/day, S3 $500→$700/day
+3. **Lead promotion**: S2=15%, S3=10% (lowers quality bar at Plan B from ~0.46 to ~0.42)
+4. **Social post #12**: "We heard you on quotas! Plan B=8K, Plan C=20K units/day. No more walls."
+5. **Ads CUT**: $2,650 → $925/day (conversion too bad to justify spend)
+### Expected Recovery Timeline:
+- Day 84: Plan B quality → 0.4474 (borderline, lead promo helps push to 0.42 bar)
+- Day 91: Plan B quality → 0.4735 (clearly above 0.46 bar → conversion should recover 15%+)
+- Day 91: Remove lead promotions once quality confirmed above threshold
+
